name: California Vipassana Center
description: California Vipassana Center (Dhamma Mahavana) is a Vipassana meditation center in North Fork, California, in the Sierra Nevada foothills. It offers 10-day silent meditation courses in the tradition of S.N. Goenka on a donation basis. The center sits on 109 acres of pine and oak forest and is one of the most established Goenka centers on the West Coast.
